title: Edge runtime constraints
description: Edge function runtimes cap CPU time and memory, forbid persistent filesystem, and limit bundle size — unlike origin servers.
body: Use when authoring or porting edge functions. Cloudflare Workers and Lambda@Edge run in constrained sandboxes: hard CPU-ms ceilings, small memory, no writable disk, restricted APIs, and bundle-size limits. Do not assume a full Node/POSIX environment. Actions: keep functions short and stateless, avoid large dependencies, and use edge KV/cache for state rather than disk. Validation signals include staying under the documented CPU/memory caps. Risk boundary: exceeding limits kills the request globally, so heavy work belongs at the origin.
